relationship_to_boundary_certificate.interpretation: The boundary certificate remains valid for the portfolio executed through the Cf/Track-A risk screen. It is not a global impossibility result and does not cover the newly frozen within-cell wartime timing estimand.

authorized_now: implement finite comparator and restricted timing template enumeration
run unit, null, CRN, anti-shed and runtime benchmark fixtures without scientific seed access
prepare immutable execution and watcher manifests
not_authorized_now: open seed 7470001 or any later scientific tape
change the frozen risk grid after implementation observations
next_gate: Commit the implementation freeze, exact manifests, passing preflight tests and benchmark before changing seed custody from reserved to executable.
